title: Magma Macro
description: A powerful, easy to use macro system for all your needs!
body:
![Magma Macro: Advanced, easy-to-use macros](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/edec8ebcca708d6fc45faadc504e149d01bcf126.png)


![Seperator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/285a2988014874aa773d46eaf192a86b4fe1f2b5.png)

### Automate Your Game
Automate anything within minutes by creating your very own custom macro! Do actions with the press of a button! Simply open your macro menu by pressing **M**, then click the create button in the top left to make your macro!

![A display of the Macro GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/829605c14f59a25f86e86f34f1b7d29f7f2f8d6f_0.webp)

![Seperator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/285a2988014874aa773d46eaf192a86b4fe1f2b5.png)

### Features

- Simple macro creation with one click, able to be binded to any key.
- Automate chat messages, commands, and movement.
- Input delays between tasks for more control.
- Supported by multiple mod loaders (Fabric, NeoForge, Forge)
- Ability to select other keymappings to automate ANY action (Coming Very Soon)

![Seperator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/285a2988014874aa773d46eaf192a86b4fe1f2b5.png)
